title: Obvious Chests
body:
# Obvious Chests
This resource pack was designed to make chests more easily visible for when your looting structures such as bastions, which can be hard to look for chests in. It also makes it easier to tell the different between normal chests and trapped chests. (The handle is either bright green for normal or bright red for trapped.)

## Compatibility
This resource pack will work with 1.20 and should work with _most_ versions prior to 1.20. Just ignore the incompatibility warning in the resource pack selection menu.

___No longer supporting or updating this resource pack.___
